mapper.sql: per.employee_id as pe_id, per.job_id as fj_id, per.job_name as fj_job_name, per.dept_id as fd_id, per.dept_name as fd_dept_name, per.start_time, per.end_time, per.remarks, per.attribute1, per.attribute2, per.attribute3, per.enabled_flag, per.id, per.create_time, per.create_by, per.update_time, per.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_fj_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_fj_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_fd_id, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_fd_dept_name, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_rehire (employee_id, job_id, job_name, dept_id, dept_name, start_time, end_time, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{job.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{job.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_rehire set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_id = #{job.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_name = #{job.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_name = #{dept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
